meta.title: Marine Corps Boot Camp Battalion Commanders' Inspection
meta.description:
U.S. Marine Corps 1st Sgt. Latisha Franklin with Alpha Company, 1st Battalion, Recruit Training Regiment explains the Battalion Commander's Inspection, at Marine Corps Recruit Depot Parris Island, S.C., 

The Battalion Commander's Inspection gauged the new Marines confidence and bearing by testing their ability to conduct themselves under pressure. 

(U.S. Marine Corps motion imagery by Lance Cpl. Devon A. Burton/Released)
